name: Warm Herring Entree or Luncheon
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the herrings in cold water and cut off the tails.
2. Peel the potatoes and cut them into thin slices.
3. Peel the onions and cut them into thin slices as well.
4. Place a layer of potato slices in a heat-resistant dish.
5. Add a layer of herring on top of the potatoes.
6. Continue alternating layers of potatoes and herring, finishing with potatoes.
7. Sprinkle ground pepper evenly over each layer.
8. Pour cream until it is about 1 inch from the top of the dish.
9. Sprinkle breadcrumbs over the top and spread small lumps of butter on the surface.
10. Place the dish in a preheated oven at 200°C (400°F) and bake for approximately 40 minutes, or until the top is browned.
Serve with ice-cold Aquavit, a strong Danish liquor.
